scores.correctness_notes: Covers the core integrate/wait pattern correctly, but misses key gold standard details: checking status.apps['myapp'].relations with AppStatusRelation (related_app, interface, scope), using actions to verify data exchange, and juju.cli('show-unit') fallback. Also doesn't mention the 'via' parameter for cross-model relations.
scores.hallucination_notes: remove_relation(..., force=True) — the force parameter is not mentioned in gold standard and may not exist; juju.offer()/juju.consume() for cross-model relations are described instead of the 'via' parameter approach mentioned in gold standard — these may exist but diverge from documented API.
